relationships.history: Fell hard for each other three weeks before Elena left for Patagonia. Never defined what they were. Elena assumed Marcus would wait. Marcus waited five months then stopped.
relationships.current_tension: Elena came back early to surprise Marcus. Marcus moved on. Neither knows how to say what they actually feel.
relationships.shared_knowledge: They both know the other felt something real. Neither admitted it before Elena left.

relationships.history: Started seeing each other two months ago. Easy, comfortable, no drama. Marcus likes who he is around Diane. Diane was getting there on love.
relationships.current_tension: Diane recently learned Marcus had someone before her that he never mentioned.
relationships.shared_knowledge: They have an honest, straightforward dynamic. Or they did until now.

relationships.history: Have never met. Neither knew the other existed until very recently.
relationships.current_tension: Diane has done her homework. Elena is walking in blind.
relationships.shared_knowledge: None. They are sizing each other up in real time.

relationships.history: Dusty Magnum shot a motorcycle campaign Elena photographed two years ago. They got along. Nothing happened.
relationships.current_tension: Elena did not expect to see Dusty Magnum here. Dusty Magnum barely remembers the shoot but remembers Elena.
relationships.shared_knowledge: They ran in overlapping circles but never got close.

relationships.current_tension: Marcus clocks Dusty Magnum immediately as the kind of guy who makes Marcus feel invisible. Dusty Magnum does not notice.
Diane finds Dusty Magnum interesting in a clinical way. Dusty Magnum thinks Diane looks like someone who has her life together.
